text: 1. Now send ye Jatavedas forth, send hitherward the vigorous Steed To seat him on our sacred grass. 2. I raise the lofty eulogy of Jatavedas, raining boons, With sages for his hero band. 3. With flames of Jatavedas which carry oblation to the Gods, May he promote our sacrifice.

metadata.title: Rig Veda - Mandala 10 Hymn 188
metadata.citation: Rig Veda, Mandala 10, Hymn 188; Ralph T. H. Griffith translation
